Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We should explain each step purpose meaning of gateways XOR AND convergence and loops

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Clarify differences between standard and custom request paths conditions for approvals or rework steps

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: tasks differ standard validation vs custom feasibility analysis parallel checks for credit inventory calculation of delivery date

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after either path tasks completed there is a decision whether approval needed If yes manager approval if granted generate final invoice else re evaluate conditions leading back to earlier tasks E1 or D If no approval needed directly generate final invoice Then send confirmation to customer

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: loops if not approved or rework required loop back to earlier tasks

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: gateway types XOR exclusive means only one path taken based on condition AND means parallel execution of multiple paths concurrently join ensures all parallel branches complete before proceeding

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After parallel checks join leads to task D After either standard or custom path completes they converge at the Is Approval Needed gateway After approval granted or not they converge at final invoice generation then confirmation

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: validation ensures data quality credit check ensures payment ability inventory check ensures stock availability calculate delivery date uses lead times prepare custom quotation includes pricing for customization features send rejection notice informs customer of inability to fulfill request

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: manager approval required when high value customization complexity The pseudo says Is Approval Needed maybe based on order value threshold or complexity

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: for Custom Path goes back to Task E1 prepare custom quotation maybe after changes in terms price due to rejection by manager For Standard Path goes back from Task H to Task D calculate delivery date maybe adjust due dates Or could be other adjustments like inventory changes

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: E2 leads directly to end event if customization not feasible

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: after generating final invoice we send confirmation and end event

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Provide details about each task purpose in business context

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Use headings sections explaining each part Overview Start Event Branching by Request Type Standard Path Custom Path Parallel Checks and Join Decision Points and Gateways Is Approval Needed Is Approval Granted Loop Back Rework Steps Finalization and End Event
